description: Unit coverage proves `assertCanApproveSubject` allows self-approval by default and denies it when a matching `not_self_approver` bundle rule is resolved.
Static/contract coverage proves workflow approval no longer has an unconditional actor==subject denial and includes a direct `not_self_approver` bundle-rule check.
Existing delegation tests continue to prove approval of other users requires existing approve/read_all or manager authorization.
Static simulator coverage proves the built-in simulator self-approval guard remains billing-only and no longer emits timesheet self-approval denial reason codes.
